data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are strategically sized and positioned for efficient accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Dynamic buttons adjusted for device interfaces.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation process by reducing user choices at each interaction step.
data.technical_spec: Hierarchal interface design minimizing decision fatigue.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content chunking to facilitate processing of information and decision-making.
data.technical_spec: User interface groups related content into manageable sections.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligning expectations by maintaining consistency with common web navigation standards.
data.technical_spec: Consistent visual language and interactive feedback across platforms.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Closely related items are placed near each other to visually associate similar content.
data.technical_spec: Use of whitespace and grouping in interface layout.
